text: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is the simulation of human intelligence processes by computer systems. These processes include learning, reasoning, and self-correction. AI was founded as an academic discipline in 1956 by John McCarthy at Dartmouth College. There are three main types of AI: 1. Narrow AI (Weak AI) - Designed to perform a specific task such as voice recognition or image classification. Examples include Siri, Alexa, and Google Translate. 2. General AI (Strong AI) - A hypothetical AI th

Examples include Siri, Alexa, and Google Translate. 2. General AI (Strong AI) - A hypothetical AI that can perform any intellectual task that a human can do. This type does not yet exist. 3. Super AI - A form of AI that surpasses human intelligence in all fields. This remains theoretical and is often discussed in the context of the AI singularity. Machine Learning (ML) is a subset of AI that allows systems to learn from data without being explicitly programmed. There are three types of machine l

s systems to learn from data without being explicitly programmed. There are three types of machine learning: - Supervised Learning: Trained on labeled data - Unsupervised Learning: Finds patterns in unlabeled data - Reinforcement Learning: Learns through rewards and penalties Deep Learning is a subset of Machine Learning that uses neural networks with many layers (deep neural networks) to analyze large amounts of data. It powers most modern AI applications like facial recognition, self-driving c

large amounts of data. It powers most modern AI applications like facial recognition, self-driving cars, and ChatGPT. The father of Artificial Intelligence is considered to be Alan Turing, who proposed the Turing Test in 1950 to measure a machine's ability to exhibit intelligent behavior indistinguishable from a human. Popular AI frameworks include TensorFlow developed by Google, PyTorch developed by Meta, and Keras which runs on top of TensorFlow. Python is the most popular programming language

by Meta, and Keras which runs on top of TensorFlow. Python is the most popular programming language used in AI development. AI is used across many industries: - Healthcare: Disease diagnosis, drug discovery - Finance: Fraud detection, stock prediction - Education: Personalized learning, AI tutors - Transportation: Self-driving cars, route optimization - Entertainment: Content recommendation, game AI
